since_last: 28% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.41%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 28% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.30% · BTC -1.89% · Gold -2.34% · Nasdaq100 -1.97%. 28% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.41%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.41%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -13.21%
cards.body: Leaders: HON +6.30%, AVAV +5.28%, SKHY +4.39%, MU +3.62%, FIX +3.03%. Laggards: TSLA -13.21%, CRNC -9.21%, GOOGL -6.54%, UPST -5.55%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.74% at $114.41
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.74% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
